scripts.format: oxfmt --write package.json bun.lock tsconfig*.json .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json playwright.config.ts vitest.config.ts apps packages tests
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check package.json bun.lock tsconfig*.json .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json playwright.config.ts vitest.config.ts apps packages tests
scripts.check: bun run format:check && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build
